title: Two Bank Stocks for Bulls After the Panic, Says Citi

title: Citi upgrades M&T Bank and KeyCorp to buy on ‘appealing' risk/reward
text: Citi on Monday upgraded shares of M&T Bank Corp. MTB, +2.28% and KeyCorp. KEY, +5.24% to buy as offering an attractive risk/reward after an analysis of bank balance sheets.
